backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the pickleball session manager, defining types and state for player profiles, sessions, court assignments, and match results, with access-controlled endpoints for creating/managing sessions and player profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the session-hosting fix (SessionConfigForm, backend call, session code, navigation) to its relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering hooks, pages, components, styles, and utilities for the pickleball app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, border, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (login, home, profile, session create/join/host/player), enforcing an auth-choice session guard before most routes.
frontend/src/components/AllRoundsSchedul: Collapsible accordion component displaying all scheduled rounds with court assignments and waitlists, resolving player names via Principal ID lookup and highlighting the current round.
frontend/src/components/CourtAssignmentC: Card component rendering a single court's Team A vs Team B player slots with avatar initials, highlighting the current player, and showing empty-slot placeholders.
frontend/src/components/GameScheduleInfo: Component that displays game schedule summary information such as session time, max games per court, and total games derived from session configuration parameters.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines two layout components: `Layout` (a page shell with optional header, back button, and footer) and `AppHeader` (a sticky app-wide header with logo and logout button).
frontend/src/components/MatchResultSubmi: Renders a card UI for submitting a match result (Team A or Team B win), showing a success state after submission and an optional skip button.
Displays a player's name, DUPR rating, and win/loss/win-rate statistics in a card, or a 'no matches' message if no games have been played.
frontend/src/components/SessionCodeDispl: Shows a pickleball session code with copy-to-clipboard and native share functionality, available in both compact and full card variants.
frontend/src/components/SessionConfigFor: A form component with a stepper input (1–10) for selecting the number of courts, used to configure and create a new session.
frontend/src/components/WaitlistPanel.ts: Renders an ordered waitlist of players with highlighted styling for the current user, or an empty-state message when no players are waiting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, session state, and game-related data via the IC actor, including retry logic and query invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines a pickleball-themed OKLCH color token system for light and dark modes, and adds custom utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/errorHandling.ts: Provides utility functions to detect IC-specific errors (canister stopped, auth, network) and format them into user-friendly messages, plus an exponential-backoff retry helper.
frontend/src/lib/storage.ts: LocalStorage helpers for persisting and retrieving player profiles, current session data, and per-session player name mappings.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, clipboard copying, DUPR rating formatting, and principal string shortening.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CreateSession.tsx: Page component for creating a new pickleball session, showing a config form and, on success, displaying the generated session code with a link to the host dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying the app hero section, active session resume card, and navigation actions for creating/joining sessions and managing player profile.
Host dashboard for managing a pickleball session, allowing the host to add players, trigger court allocation, and view current assignments, waitlist, and all rounds schedule.
frontend/src/pages/JoinSession.tsx: Page where a player enters a session code to join an existing session, handling validation and error display before navigating to the player session view.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page offering Internet Identity sign-in or guest access, storing the auth choice in sessionStorage and redirecting to the home page after authentication.
frontend/src/pages/PlayerSessionView.tsx: Read-only session view for non-host players showing current court assignments, waitlist, match result submission, and all rounds schedule resolved from stored player names.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: React page for creating a new user profile with name and DUPR rating fields. Saves profile to localStorage for all users and additionally to the backend for authenticated users, then navigates to a next route.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileView.tsx: React page for viewing and inline-editing the locally stored player profile (name and DUPR rating). Persists changes to localStorage and shows toast notifications on save or validation errors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (using OKLCH), typography, border radius, box shadows, and font families, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, known issues, and existing features. Currently marks a fix request for the session hosting flow bug.
